items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the unified scope model for all sources versus selected sources. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or concrete API reads that confirm the implementation of this model. The linked use case mentions the need for this model, but there is no evidence of its existence or functionality, indicating a gap in the required validation.
